output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?animal ?animalLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q4965 wdt:P171 ?coyoteGenus .
  ?coyoteGenus wdt:P171 wd:Q4109 .
  ?animal wdt:P171 ?animalGenus .
  ?animalGenus wdt:P171 wd:Q4109 .
  ?animal wdt:P31 wd:Q16521 .
  ?animal rdfs:label ?animalLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?animalLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(?animal != wd:Q4965)
  .
}
